title: thelypteris reederi
intro: Thelypteris reederi, also known as Reeder's fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It is native to the tropical and subtropical regions of the Americas and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions. Thelypteris reederi can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and in some cultures, it is also used as a topical application or added to baths for its medicinal properties.
